text: This rendering seems to give the best sense to the Latin; but its language is obscure, and that of the Hebrew text even more so.
‘To speak a generous word’; literally, ‘that thy word may be as a sacrifice’, but the Hebrew word evidently meant is one which can also meant ‘a free gift’. The Hebrew text has a ‘refreshment’.
Two hundred sicles would be more than six pounds, and some think the figure has been exaggerated by an error in the text.
